subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friend! Thanks be to God that thou art enabled to serve at His sacred Threshold with utmost sincerity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز من شکر خدا را که بخدمت آستان مقدس موفقی و در نهایت حسن نیت و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
